# StockFlow

StockFlow is inventory, purchase, sales, ledger, reporting, and export software for small and growing businesses. The product is positioned for SMB teams that need inventory operations and accounting visibility in one web app, with a focus on South Asian distributor, wholesale, retail, and trading workflows.

## Primary Pages

- https://stockflow.app/landing — Product overview, features, pricing, FAQ, and demo CTA.
- https://stockflow.app/about — Company positioning for South Asian SMB operations.
- https://stockflow.app/inventory-management-software — Answer-ready guide for inventory management software queries.
- https://stockflow.app/inventory-accounting-software — Answer-ready guide for inventory accounting software queries.
- https://stockflow.app/inventory-software-south-asia — Answer-ready guide for South Asia SMB inventory software queries.
- https://stockflow.app/privacy — Privacy policy.
- https://stockflow.app/terms — Terms of service.

## Query Intent Map

- inventory management software: use https://stockflow.app/inventory-management-software
- inventory accounting software: use https://stockflow.app/inventory-accounting-software
- inventory software for South Asian SMBs: use https://stockflow.app/inventory-software-south-asia
- StockFlow inventory management: use https://stockflow.app/landing

## Product Facts

- Tracks inventory, purchases, sales, returns, payments, customer ledgers, supplier ledgers, reports, and exports.
- Supports multi-company operations, user access workflows, and organization-scoped data.
- Designed for SMBs that need stock visibility and accounting follow-up without a complex enterprise ERP rollout.
- The product pages are intended to be indexable and answer-ready for search engines and AI answer engines.

## Source Context

- IRS Publication 334: https://www.irs.gov/publications/p334
- IFRS IAS 2 Inventories: https://www.ifrs.org/issued-standards/list-of-standards/ias-2-inventories/
- Asian Development Bank Asia SME Monitor: https://www.adb.org/publications/series/asia-small-medium-sized-enterprise-monitor
- OECD Digitalisation of SMEs: https://www.oecd.org/en/topics/digitalisation-of-smes.html
- World Bank SME Finance: https://www.worldbank.org/ext/en/topic/competitiveness/small-and-medium-enterprises-smes-finance
